title: Sorcerer's Fantasy
description: Small modpack made with smaller magic and exploration mods in mind. (No create!)
body:
![Title Name](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91f2b4ad048e37948866359ab4086466485103e7.png)
### What is Sorcerer's Fantasy?
Sorcerer's Fantasy is a small modpack with a focus on magic, exploration, and building. There is no objective, but there are plenty of endgame goals with new bosses to kill, structures to explore, and artifacts to find. 
  
- Become an arcane practitioner with Ars Nouveau, Eidolon, Pastel, and Malum. 
- Slay a mighty beast with Bosses'Rise and revamped vanilla bosses. 
- Construct a grand castle with Architect's Palette, Supplimentaries, and Quark.
- Or, simply become a humble farmer living off the land with Farmers Delight and Starcatcher.

### Performance
With less than 200 mods, several of which are optimization focused, I've tried my best to make this pack load fast and run well.

### Configuration
Most mods remain relatively unchanged, although some mods have been tweaked for balance.

This pack was built as a modpack just for me and my friends, but I decided to upload it to modrinth so others could try it.

No AI was used in any part of this project.
